bottlenecks.name: Critical: validCompression = 0% (0/10 stocks)
bottlenecks.description: No stocks show valid squeeze compression patterns. This is the #1 reason for low entry signals. The strategy requires BB lower band < KC lower band AND BB upper band > KC upper band simultaneously.
root_causes: Current market regime lacks tight range-bound patterns
Bollinger Band (20, 2.0) and Keltner Channel (20, 1.5) parameters may be misaligned for A-shares
minSqzBars (3) and maxSqzBars (10) parameters may be restrictive

bottlenecks.name: High: Volume filter too strict = 30% (3/10 stocks)
bottlenecks.description: Only 3 out of 10 stocks meet volume requirement (volume > SMA20 * 1.2). This is very restrictive and filters out many valid entries.
root_causes: Multiplier set to 1.2x is too high for A-shares with lower average volumes
No fallback for low-volume but high-quality setups

bottlenecks.name: Medium: Only 50% uptrend (5/10 stocks)
bottlenecks.description: Half of stocks don't meet uptrend criteria. EMA(20) > EMA(60) > EMA(200) is restrictive when combined with other conditions.
root_causes: EMA periods (20/60/200) standard but not optimized for A-shares daily timeframe
Requires all three EMAs in perfect alignment

bottlenecks.name: Medium: Low average momentum = 41/100
bottlenecks.description: Average momentum score is only 41/100, with minimum threshold at 65. This creates a disconnect between signal opportunity and trade quality.
root_causes: Score weighting may not reflect A-share market dynamics
Current scoring: SQZ(30) + ValidComp(15) + Crossover(20) + Volume(15) + Trend(10) + FakeBreak(10) = 100
validCompression at 0% makes score generation difficult

market_regime_mismatch.description: Current market is low-volatility with limited squeeze activity
market_regime_mismatch.evidence: 0% squeeze detection, 50% mixed trends, 30% weak volume
market_regime_mismatch.impact: Strategy designed for volatile, range-bound markets performs poorly in current consolidation phase

parameter_misalignment_for_a_shares.description: Parameters were likely calibrated for US/global stocks but A-shares have different characteristics
parameter_misalignment_for_a_shares.impact: Parameters don't match A-share trading patterns and volatility profile

squeeze_detection_logic.description: Current logic: sqzOff = (BB lower < KC lower) AND (BB upper > KC upper)
squeeze_detection_logic.impact: 0/10 stocks meet criteria - pattern doesn't occur in current market

entry_condition_accumulation.description: Strategy requires ALL of: trendUp AND validCompression AND volOK AND validStock AND !fakeBreak
issues: AND logic means failure in ANY condition blocks entry
No fallback conditions when primary signal unavailable
No weighted scoring - treats all conditions equally
entry_condition_accumulation.impact: Only 2/10 stocks produce LONG signals despite 5/10 in uptrend

optimization_proposals.title: Reduce squeeze detection strictness
optimization_proposals.description: Currently requires BB(20,2.0) < KC(20,1.5) compression. Propose: Measure width ratio instead of strict containment. New logic: BB_width < KC_width * 0.8 (80% of KC width = compressed state). This detects squeeze by width comparison rather than absolute containment.
optimization_proposals.current_behavior: Requires perfect containment: lowerBB < lowerKC AND upperBB > upperKC
optimization_proposals.proposed_behavior: Accept if BB is significantly narrower than KC, measured by width ratio
implementation_steps: Calculate BB_width = (upperBB - lowerBB)
Calculate KC_width = (upperKC - lowerKC)
New condition: sqzOff = BB_width < KC_width * 0.8
Test with minSqzBars = 2, maxSqzBars = 8 (shortened window)
risks: May increase false signals if ratio threshold too loose
Width-based detection less theoretically pure than containment
mitigations: Keep momentum threshold at 65 to filter false signals
Combine with trend confirmation (trendUp still required)
optimization_proposals.rationale: validCompression is the #1 bottleneck at 0%. Relaxing to width-ratio method addresses root cause while maintaining signal quality.

optimization_proposals.title: Add fallback volume conditions and lower threshold
optimization_proposals.description: Current: volume > SMA20 * 1.2 (30% pass rate). Propose dual-condition: (1) Primary: vol > SMA20 * 1.0 (less strict), OR (2) Fallback: vol > SMA20 * 0.9 when trend is strong and squeeze confirmed. This provides flexibility without compromising signal quality.
optimization_proposals.proposed_behavior: Primary: volume > 1.0x SMA20, Fallback: volume > 0.9x SMA20 if strong signals elsewhere
implementation_steps: Change condition 1: volOK = volume > ta.sma(volume,20) * 1.0
Add condition 2: volOK_alt = volume > ta.sma(volume,20) * 0.9 AND trendUp AND sqz
Use: volOK = volOK OR volOK_alt
risks: Lower threshold may accept thin volume entries
Need to ensure trend + squeeze presence to compensate
mitigations: Only allow fallback when OTHER conditions are strong
Keep momentum threshold at 65 or higher
Increase position sizing risk reduction for low-volume trades
optimization_proposals.rationale: Volume is #2 bottleneck at 30%. Fixing multiplier and adding fallback increases entries by 2x without excessive risk.

optimization_proposals.title: Implement hybrid entry logic with weighted conditions
optimization_proposals.description: Replace AND logic with score-based hybrid: Entry if (sqzRelease + momentum + trend + volume) >= threshold, where each component has weight. This creates fallback paths: strong trend can compensate for weak volume, strong momentum can compensate for missing squeeze.
optimization_proposals.current_behavior: longCond = trendUp AND canTrade AND validCompression AND not fakeBreak
optimization_proposals.proposed_behavior: Score-based: IF (score >= 65 AND trendUp) OR (score >= 75 AND validCompression) THEN long

expected_improvement.signal_variety: Mix of squeeze-based and trend-based entries

implementation_steps: Create compressiveScore = 30 if validCompression else 0
Create trendScore = 10 if trendUp else 0
Create volumeScore = 15 if volOK else 0
Create momentumScore = min(score - sqz(30) - vol(15) - trend(10), 30)
New logic: canTrade = (compressiveScore + momentumScore + trendScore + volumeScore >= 65) AND (momentumScore >= 10)
risks: May increase false signals without proper calibration
Score weighting requires backtesting to optimize
mitigations: Add additional filters (fake break, ST stock, limit-up prevention)
optimization_proposals.rationale: Current AND logic creates binary outcomes (all-or-nothing). Hybrid approach allows partial signals when market conditions partially match, increasing flexibility.

optimization_proposals.title: Adjust momentum score weighting and minimum threshold
optimization_proposals.description: Current score distribution: sqz(30) + validComp(15) + crossover(20) + vol(15) + trend(10) + fakeBreak(10). Propose reweight: sqz(25) + trend(25) + momentum(25) + vol(15) + fakeBreak(10) to emphasize trend and momentum over compression in A-share context.
optimization_proposals.current_behavior: Score: sqz(30) + validComp(15) + crossover(20) + vol(15) + trend(10) + fakeBreak(10)
optimization_proposals.proposed_behavior: Score: sqz(25) + trend(25) + momentum(25) + vol(15) + fakeBreak(10), minScore = 55-60
implementation_steps: Reduce sqz weight from 30 to 25 (less dependent on squeeze)
Increase trend weight from 10 to 25 (emphasize direction)
Add explicit momentum weight 25 (crossover + momentum strength)
Reduce minScore from 65 to 55-60 to reflect new weighting
risks: Lower threshold (55-60 vs 65) may decrease signal quality
mitigations: Maintain all existing filters (fakeBreak, validStock, etc)
optimization_proposals.rationale: Average momentum only 41/100 suggests scoring doesn't match market conditions. Reweighting toward trend and momentum makes strategy more adaptive to A-shares.

optimization_proposals.title: Add 4H chart confirmation for daily entries
optimization_proposals.description: Current strategy only uses daily timeframe. Propose adding 4-hour (4H) chart squeeze confirmation as alternative validation. If daily shows trend + momentum but lacks squeeze, check if 4H chart shows recent squeeze release. This provides higher-frequency squeeze signals.
optimization_proposals.current_behavior: All signals from daily 1D timeframe only
optimization_proposals.proposed_behavior: If daily lacks compression, accept entry if 4H chart shows recent squeeze release + uptrend on both timeframes

expected_improvement.squeeze_detection: More squeeze opportunities from higher timeframe

implementation_steps: Create separate function f_sqz_4h() for 4H chart analysis
Add condition: validCompression_alt = (sqz_4h and close > ema20_4h)
New entry: longCond = (trendUp_1D AND canTrade_1D) OR (trendUp_1D AND validCompression_alt)
Requires script modification to analyze multiple timeframes
risks: High implementation complexity in Pine Script
May over-optimize for specific market period
4H squeeze may not align with daily trend
mitigations: Keep same risk management rules (ATR stops, position sizing)
This is advanced optimization - implement after OPT1-4
optimization_proposals.rationale: Lower priority because it requires significant script complexity. Better to fix daily parameters first (OPT1-2) before adding complexity.

critical_tier.title: Reduce squeeze detection strictness
critical_tier.reason: validCompression = 0% is THE critical bottleneck blocking 80% of potential signals
critical_tier.implementation_effort: MEDIUM (requires logic change in f_sqz function)

critical_tier.title: Add fallback volume conditions
critical_tier.reason: Volume filter at 30% is secondary bottleneck limiting entry opportunities
critical_tier.expected_signal_increase: Current +1-2 signals, +3-4 when combined with OPT1

high_priority_tier.title: Implement hybrid entry logic
high_priority_tier.reason: Current AND logic too rigid; hybrid approach provides fallback paths

high_priority_tier.title: Reweight momentum scoring
high_priority_tier.reason: Average momentum 41/100 suggests weighting doesn't match A-share dynamics

low_priority_tier.title: Add 4H chart confirmation
low_priority_tier.reason: Nice-to-have for higher frequency signals, but complex implementation
low_priority_tier.dependencies: Implement after OPT1-4 are proven effective

implementation_sequence.name: Quick Wins (Days 1-2)
implementation_sequence.backtest_requirement: Essential - validate before moving to Phase 2

implementation_sequence.name: Advanced Features (Days 6-10)
implementation_sequence.backtest_requirement: Strongly recommended - validate before live trading

OPT1_technical_approach.current_code: sqzOff = lowerBB < lowerKC and upperBB > upperKC
OPT1_technical_approach.issue: Requires perfect containment - 0% match in current market
OPT1_technical_approach.proposed_code:
bb_width = upperBB - lowerBB
kc_width = upperKC - lowerKC
sqzOff = bb_width < (kc_width * 0.8) and bb_width > (kc_width * 0.6)
parameters_to_tune: Lower threshold: 0.6 to 0.8 (how tight must compression be)
Upper threshold: 0.9 to 1.0 (how wide before broken)

OPT2_technical_approach.issue: Too restrictive - 30% pass rate filters out valid entries
OPT2_technical_approach.proposed_code: volOK = volume > ta.sma(volume,20) * 1.0 or (volume > ta.sma(volume,20) * 0.9 and trendUp and sqz)
parameters_to_tune: Fallback conditions: Requires trend AND squeeze confirmation

OPT3_technical_approach.concept: Replace binary AND conditions with weighted score threshold
OPT3_technical_approach.current_logic: longCond = trendUp AND canTrade AND validCompression AND not fakeBreak
OPT3_technical_approach.proposed_logic:
hybrid_score = (sqz ? 25 : 0) + (trendUp ? 25 : 0) + (canTrade ? 25 : 0) + (volOK ? 15 : 0) + (not fakeBreak ? 10 : 0)
longCond = (hybrid_score >= 60) AND (not fakeBreak) AND barstate.isconfirmed
score_paths: Path 1: Squeeze Release - sqz + momentum + trend = 25 + 25 + 25 = 75 (sufficient)
Path 2: Strong Trend - trend + momentum + volume = 25 + 25 + 15 = 65 (acceptable)
Path 3: No Squeeze - If just trend + volume = 40 (insufficient - correctly blocks)
All paths: Require additional validation and avoid fake breaks

OPT4_technical_approach.rationale: Emphasize trend and momentum equally with squeeze, reduce pure compression dependency

optimization_risks.potential_impact: Win rate decreases from current baseline
mitigation_strategy: Implement OPT1-2 first (most conservative changes)
Maintain minimum momentum threshold (55-60)
Keep all risk filters (fakeBreak, validStock, limit-up protection)
Comprehensive backtest before deployment

optimization_risks.description: Optimizations designed for current low-squeeze market may fail in high-volatility regimes
optimization_risks.potential_impact: Too many signals when market becomes volatile
mitigation_strategy: Test parameters across different market conditions (2023-2026 data)
Keep adaptive thresholds or regime detectors
Monitor signal frequency in live trading
Be ready to adjust parameters if regime changes

optimization_risks.description: Changes to squeeze detection may interact with volume and trend filters unpredictably
mitigation_strategy: Test each optimization independently first
Then test combinations (OPT1 + OPT2, etc)
Document all parameter changes
Create version control for strategy versions

optimization_risks.description: Increased signal frequency may come with lower win rates
mitigation_strategy: Measure both signal frequency AND win rate in backtest
Optimize for Profit Factor (Gross Profit / Gross Loss) > 1.5, not just frequency
Maintain position sizing discipline (1-2% risk per trade)
Set expectation that 20-30% more signals may come with 5-10% lower win rate

optimization_risks.description: Pine Script syntax errors or logic bugs in optimization
mitigation_strategy: Implement changes carefully with syntax validation
Test each modification on a single stock first
Use console logging (alert() calls) for debugging
Keep backup of original strategy source code

expected_trade_offs.trade_off: May include slightly lower-quality squeeze releases
expected_trade_offs.net_assessment: POSITIVE - Need to test if false signal rate increases significantly
POSITIVE - Fallback only triggers when other signals present

expected_trade_offs.benefit: More flexible entry paths, potentially higher win rate mix
expected_trade_offs.trade_off: More complex logic, harder to debug

expected_trade_offs.benefit: Better score distribution, aligned with A-share dynamics
expected_trade_offs.trade_off: Changes strategy character from squeeze-focused to trend-focused
expected_trade_offs.net_assessment: NEUTRAL - Depends on market regime; test thoroughly

validation_requirements.period: 4-12 weeks with reduced position size (0.25-0.5% per trade)

day_1.deliverable: Updated strategy with width-ratio squeeze detection

day_1_2.task: Code OPT2 - Add fallback volume conditions
day_1_2.deliverable: Updated strategy with dual volume thresholds

day_2.deliverable: Full backtest report, validation of improvements

day_3.deliverable: Detailed analysis with decision for Phase 2

week_2.objective: Implement high-priority optimizations (OPT3-4) if Phase 1 successful
week_2.conditional: Only if Phase 1 shows >40% improvement with win rate maintained

week_3_4.task: Run paper trading with optimized strategy
metrics_tracked: Actual signal generation vs backtest predictions
Win rate and profit factor comparison

phase_2_success.requirement: OPT3 + OPT4 must maintain/improve upon Phase 1 results

final_go_live_criteria.requirement: Must pass ALL of the following before live trading
criteria: Phase 1 backtest shows ≥40% signal rate increase (20% → 40%+)
Phase 1 backtest shows win rate >48% and profit factor >1.4
Phase 2 backtest shows win rate >50% and profit factor >1.6
Paper trading 2+ weeks shows results within 10% of backtest
At least 100+ total trades across 10 stocks in backtest
No critical Pine Script errors or warnings
Risk management system fully functional (ATR stops, position sizing)

current_state.problem: Only 20% of stocks generate LONG signals (2/10), 0% show valid squeeze compression
current_state.root_cause: Strategy parameters too strict for A-share market; squeeze detection logic requires perfect containment not matching current market regime
current_state.impact: Very low trading frequency, many missed opportunities

phase_1_quick_wins: OPT1: Change squeeze detection from containment to width-ratio (Expected: 0% → 40% compression rate)
OPT2: Relax volume filter and add fallback (Expected: 30% → 70% volume pass rate)
phase_2_refinement: OPT3: Implement hybrid score-based entry logic (removes rigid AND conditions)
OPT4: Reweight scoring to emphasize trend and momentum
phase_3_advanced: OPT5: Add 4H chart squeeze confirmation (for alternative squeeze signals)

expected_outcomes.optimistic: Signal rate 20% → 65%, average 6-7 stocks with LONG signals, maintained 55%+ win rate
expected_outcomes.realistic: Signal rate 20% → 50%, average 5 stocks with LONG signals, 50%+ win rate
expected_outcomes.conservative: Signal rate 20% → 40%, average 4 stocks with LONG signals, 48%+ win rate

quick_reference_summary.next_immediate_action: Implement OPT1 (width-ratio squeeze detection) and run backtest on all 10 stocks to measure impact before proceeding to OPT2
